Full name: Saibh O'Neill

Clothes: Green varsity jacket, gray sports bra, black jeans, tweed paperboy hat, paddy cap

Appearance: Saibh is a toned dog furry, with abs, usually wearing her varsity jacket open to reveal her toned belly and sports bra. Her ears are long and droopy, and her fur is completely ginger colored. Her canine head has short wavy locks that seem to blend in with her floppy dog ears. Her nipples are orange. Her tail is droopy with long fur.

Personality: Saibh is a fairly serious person, and a bit of a recluse. Not easily trusting people and keeping to herself most days. She has a bit of a sailor mouth, lots of cursing. Saibh is an Irish woman, with a heavy Irish accent.

Backstory: Ah sure, Saibh was just a regular tomboy growin’ up back
